# STRAT.036 ? Servant Leadership (Greenleaf)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** leadership_frameworks
**Domain:** LEADERSHIP_FRAMEWORKS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Leader as servant first; others' growth priority; community building; listening; empathy; stewardship; commitment to people

## Application
Serve first, lead second; prioritize others' growth; listen deeply; show empathy; build community; steward resources; develop people

## Key Values
- Service first
- Others' growth
- Listening
- Empathy
- Community
- Stewardship

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, leadership_frameworks

Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
